# Data Dictionary вҖ” Paper 2 Supplemental Files

**Paper:** *Empirical Validation of the Rational Taper Kinematic Model: A Comparative Analysis Against ОӣCDM and MOND*  
**Author:** Justin Schneider  
**Generated by:** `notebooks/08_supplemental_data_prep.ipynb`

## Key Physical Constants

| Constant | Value | Units | Description |
|----------|-------|-------|-------------|
| aвӮҖ (MOND fixed) | 3703.0 | kmВІ sвҒ»ВІ kpcвҒ»В№ | MOND acceleration scale = 1.2Г—10вҒ»В№вҒ° m sвҒ»ВІ |
| ОҘ_disk | 0.5 | Mвҳү/Lвҳү | Stellar mass-to-light ratio (3.6 Вөm disk) |
| ОҘ_bulge | 0.7 | Mвҳү/Lвҳү | Stellar mass-to-light ratio (3.6 Вөm bulge) |
| HвӮҖ | 73 | km sвҒ»В№ MpcвҒ»В№ | Hubble constant (used for NFW RвӮӮвӮҖвӮҖ) |
| G | 4.302Г—10вҒ»Ві | pc (km sвҒ»В№)ВІ MвҳүвҒ»В№ | Gravitational constant |

## Model Equations

**Rational Taper:** V_RT = V_bary + ПүВ·R / (1 + R/R_t)  
**NFW:** VВІ_NFW = VВІвӮӮвӮҖвӮҖ В· [ln(1+cx) вҲ’ cx/(1+cx)] / {xВ·[ln(1+c) вҲ’ c/(1+c)]},  x = R/RвӮӮвӮҖвӮҖ, RвӮӮвӮҖвӮҖ = VвӮӮвӮҖвӮҖ/(10В·HвӮҖ)  
**MOND (Simple):** VВІ_MOND = VВІ_bary + (VВІ_bary/2)В·(вҲҡ(1 + 4В·aвӮҖВ·R/VВІ_bary) вҲ’ 1)  
**BIC:** BIC = ПҮВІ + kВ·ln(N), where ПҮВІ = ОЈ[(V_obs вҲ’ V_model)ВІ/ПғВІ]

## Baryonic Velocity Convention

V_bary uses the **signed-square** convention to handle negative SPARC velocity contributions:  
V_bary = вҲҡ(|V_gas|В·V_gas + ОҘ_dВ·|V_disk|В·V_disk + ОҘ_bВ·|V_bulge|В·V_bulge)

---

## File 1: `Tournament_Results.csv`

One row per galaxy (N=175). Contains galaxy metadata, fit parameters for all four models, and summary statistics.

| Column | Type | Units | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| `GalaxyID` | string | вҖ” | SPARC galaxy identifier |
| `SPARC_Q` | integer | вҖ” | SPARC quality flag (1=best, 2=ok, 3=problematic) |
| `Clean_Sample` | boolean | вҖ” | True if SPARC_Q вүӨ 2 (primary analysis sample, N=163) |
| `Luminosity_1e9Lsun` | float | 10вҒ№ Lвҳү | 3.6 Вөm luminosity (SPARC photometry) |
| `R_disk_kpc` | float | kpc | Exponential disk scale length (SPARC) |
| `SB_disk_magarcsec2` | float | mag arcsecвҒ»ВІ | Central disk surface brightness at 3.6 Вөm |
| `V_flat_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | Asymptotic flat rotation velocity (SPARC) |
| `N_pts` | integer | вҖ” | Number of radial data points used in fits |
| `RT_omega_kms_kpc` | float | km sвҒ»В№ kpcвҒ»В№ | RT: taper slope Пү (free parameter) |
| `RT_omega_err_kms_kpc` | float | km sвҒ»В№ kpcвҒ»В№ | RT: 1Пғ uncertainty on Пү from curve_fit covariance |
| `RT_Rt_kpc` | float | kpc | RT: transition radius R_t (free parameter) |
| `RT_Rt_err_kpc` | float | kpc | RT: 1Пғ uncertainty on R_t |
| `RT_BIC` | float | вҖ” | RT: Bayesian Information Criterion = ПҮВІ + kВ·ln(N), k=2 |
| `RT_RMSE_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | RT: root-mean-square residual (V_obs вҲ’ V_model) |
| `RT_chi2` | float | вҖ” | RT: total ПҮВІ (not reduced) |
| `RT_chi2r` | float | вҖ” | RT: reduced ПҮВІ_r = ПҮВІ / (N вҲ’ k) |
| `RT_converged` | boolean | вҖ” | RT: True if scipy.optimize.curve_fit converged |
| `NFW_c` | float | вҖ” | NFW: concentration parameter c (free parameter) |
| `NFW_c_err` | float | вҖ” | NFW: 1Пғ uncertainty on c |
| `NFW_V200_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | NFW: virial velocity VвӮӮвӮҖвӮҖ (free parameter) |
| `NFW_V200_err_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | NFW: 1Пғ uncertainty on VвӮӮвӮҖвӮҖ |
| `NFW_BIC` | float | вҖ” | NFW: BIC = ПҮВІ + kВ·ln(N), k=2 |
| `NFW_RMSE_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | NFW: root-mean-square residual |
| `NFW_chi2` | float | вҖ” | NFW: total ПҮВІ |
| `NFW_chi2r` | float | вҖ” | NFW: reduced ПҮВІ_r |
| `NFW_converged` | boolean | вҖ” | NFW: True if curve_fit converged |
| `MondFree_a0_kms2_kpc` | float | kmВІ sвҒ»ВІ kpcвҒ»В№ | MOND-free: best-fit aвӮҖ (free parameter; canonical = 3703.0) |
| `MondFree_a0_err_kms2_kpc` | float | kmВІ sвҒ»ВІ kpcвҒ»В№ | MOND-free: 1Пғ uncertainty on aвӮҖ |
| `MondFree_BIC` | float | вҖ” | MOND-free: BIC = ПҮВІ + kВ·ln(N), k=1 |
| `MondFree_RMSE_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | MOND-free: root-mean-square residual |
| `MondFree_chi2` | float | вҖ” | MOND-free: total ПҮВІ |
| `MondFree_chi2r` | float | вҖ” | MOND-free: reduced ПҮВІ_r |
| `MondFree_converged` | boolean | вҖ” | MOND-free: True if curve_fit converged |
| `Free_MOND_Boundary` | boolean | вҖ” | True if fitted aвӮҖ is within 100 kmВІ sвҒ»ВІ kpcвҒ»В№ of optimizer bounds [1000, 10000] |
| `MondFixed_a0_kms2_kpc` | float | kmВІ sвҒ»ВІ kpcвҒ»В№ | MOND-fixed: canonical aвӮҖ = 3703.0 (not fitted, k=0) |
| `MondFixed_BIC` | float | вҖ” | MOND-fixed: BIC = ПҮВІ + kВ·ln(N), k=0 |
| `MondFixed_RMSE_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | MOND-fixed: root-mean-square residual |
| `MondFixed_chi2` | float | вҖ” | MOND-fixed: total ПҮВІ |
| `MondFixed_chi2r` | float | вҖ” | MOND-fixed: reduced ПҮВІ_r |
| `MondFixed_converged` | boolean | вҖ” | MOND-fixed: always True (no optimization) |
| `Delta_BIC_NFW_RT` | float | вҖ” | BIC_NFW вҲ’ BIC_RT; positive = Rational Taper preferred |
| `BIC_Winner` | string | вҖ” | Model with lowest BIC: rational_taper | nfw | mond_free | mond_fixed |

---

## File 2: `Radial_Residuals.csv`

One row per radial data point (~3,391 rows). Contains per-point model velocities and residuals for all 175 galaxies.

| Column | Type | Units | Description |
|--------|------|-------|-------------|
| `GalaxyID` | string | вҖ” | SPARC galaxy identifier |
| `SPARC_Q` | integer | вҖ” | SPARC quality flag |
| `Radius_kpc` | float | kpc | Galactocentric radius |
| `R_over_Rmax` | float | вҖ” | Radius normalised by maximum observed radius R/R_max |
| `R_over_Rdisk` | float | вҖ” | Radius normalised by disk scale length R/R_disk |
| `V_obs_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | Observed circular velocity |
| `V_obs_err_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | Uncertainty on V_obs (floor 1.0 km/s applied during fitting) |
| `V_bary_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | Total baryonic velocity (signed-square; ОҘ_disk=0.5, ОҘ_bulge=0.7) |
| `V_RT_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | Rational Taper model velocity at this radius |
| `V_NFW_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | NFW model velocity at this radius |
| `V_MondFixed_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | MOND-fixed model velocity at this radius |
| `V_MondFree_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | MOND-free model velocity at this radius |
| `Resid_RT_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | RT residual: V_obs вҲ’ V_RT |
| `Resid_NFW_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | NFW residual: V_obs вҲ’ V_NFW |
| `Resid_MondFixed_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | MOND-fixed residual: V_obs вҲ’ V_MondFixed |
| `Resid_MondFree_kms` | float | km sвҒ»В№ | MOND-free residual: V_obs вҲ’ V_MondFree |
